concept: Two Dots is a minimalist puzzle game where players connect two or more adjacent dots of the same color, either horizontally or vertically, to clear them from a grid-based board. Forming a square with four matching dots clears all dots of that color from the entire board, introducing a key strategic element. Each of the thousands of levels presents unique objectives, such as clearing specific dot quantities or dropping special items, all within a limited number of moves, with failure costing a life. Progression involves advancing through a vast world map, encountering new obstacles and mechanics, alongside diverse game modes like Scavenger Hunts and Treasure Hunts offering varied challenges and collectible trophies. Controls are intuitive, requiring a simple tap and drag to draw lines between matching dots. Monetization includes optional in-app purchases for power-ups like extra moves or shuffles, and lives, with random item purchases also available.
name: Two Dots - Connect the Colors
